8:Taf8,<span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">name</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">:</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)"> </span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-string-expression)">Build and Deploy Docs</span></span>
<span></span>
<span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-constant)">on</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">:</span></span>
<span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)">  </span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">push</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">:</span></span>
<span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)">    </span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">branches</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">:</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)"> [</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-string)">main</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)">]</span></span>
<span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)">  </span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">workflow_dispatch</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">:</span></span>
<span></span>
<span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">jobs</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">:</span></span>
<span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)">  </span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">build</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">:</span></span>
<span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)">    </span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">uses</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">:</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)"> </span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-string-expression)">./packages/laravel-docit/.github/workflows/build-docs.yml</span></span>
<span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)">    </span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">with</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">:</span></span>

<span></span>0:{"P":null,"b":"xZsdvz3SvhqGGVwjESMDV","c":["","github-actions"],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["github-actions",{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",true],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/css/306cf1013566e627.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}]],"$L2"]}],{"children":[["$","$1","c",{"children":[null,["$","$L3",null,{"parallelRouterKey":"children","error":"$undefined","errorStyles":"$undefined","errorScripts":"$undefined","template":["$","$L4",null,{}],"templateStyles":"$undefined","templateScripts":"$undefined","notFound":"$undefined","forbidden":"$undefined","unauthorized":"$undefined"}]]}],{"children":[["$","$1","c",{"children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"flex h-full flex-col pt-16 pb-10","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex-auto prose dark:prose-invert [html_:where(&>*)]:mx-auto [html_:where(&>*)]:max-w-2xl lg:[html_:where(&>*)]:mx-[calc(50%-min(50%,var(--container-lg)))] lg:[html_:where(&>*)]:max-w-3xl","children":[["$","h1",null,{"children":"GitHub Actions"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Docit includes a reusable workflow for building and deploying docs on push."}],"\n",["$","$L5",null,{"level":2,"id":"output-directory","children":"Output directory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"language":"txt","children":["Set ",["$","$L6",null,{"children":"DOCIT_OUTPUT_DIR"}]," (or the workflow's ",["$","$L6",null,{"children":"output-dir"}]," input) to control where the built site is written. Common choices:"]}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Output"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Use case"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"language":"txt","children":["$","$L6",null,{"children":"docs/dist"}]}],["$","td",null,{"language":"txt","children":["Default. 15:Taf1,<span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">name</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword)">:</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)"> </span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-string-expression)">Build and Deploy Docs</span></span>

<span></span>b:["$","$L7",null,{"language":"yaml","code":"name: Build and Deploy Docs\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  build:\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/build-docs.yml\n    with:\n      docit-path: vendor/christhompsontldr/laravel-docit\n      output-dir: docs   # or dist, build, etc.\n","children":["$","$L6",null,{"className":"language-yaml","children":"$15"}]}]

f:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Deploy from a branch:"}]}]
